2026-02-26JUSNunavut ActOrder Appointing the Hon. Nancy L. Backhouse, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of JusticeOrder appointing the Honourable Nancy L. Backhouse, former judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.N/A
subject: Order Appointing the Hon. Nancy L. Backhouse, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice
precis: Order appointing the Honourable Nancy L. Backhouse, former judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.
